edges.description: Retinal arteriolar remodeling contributes to clinically visible retinopathy.
Retinal microvascular findings can contribute to systemic vascular risk assessment.
edges.source: Systemic vascular stiffness and atherosclerosis association
Cardiovascular risk-factor management and retinal surveillance
edges.target: Systemic vascular stiffness and atherosclerosis association

nodes.description: No disease-specific ocular pharmacotherapy was identified in the Falcon report. Practical management is prevention-oriented: identify and treat systemic vascular risk factors and monitor retinal vascular signs over time.
nodes.id: Cardiovascular risk-factor management and retinal surveillance

evidence.reference_title: Examination of Large Artery Atherosclerosis could Reveal Small Artery Retinopathy in Untreated Middle-Aged Individuals.
evidence.snippet: CAVI and carotid IMT are independent determinants of retinopathy.

evidence.reference_title: Non-Invasive Retinal Vessel Analysis as a Predictor for Cardiovascular Disease.
evidence.snippet: Retinal vascular imaging using AI may help identify the cardiovascular risk

nodes.description: The central disease process is sclerosis and remodeling of retinal arterioles, visible as Scheie-defined atherosclerotic retinal changes and related fundus arteriosclerosis signs.

evidence.reference_title: Examination of Large Artery Atherosclerosis could Reveal Small Artery Retinopathy in Untreated Middle-Aged Individuals.
evidence.snippet: retinopathy based on Scheie classification are often applied to evaluate the impact of hypertension and atherosclerosis.

evidence.reference_title: Association between Ophthalmological Changes and Cardiovascular Diseases in Patients with Chronic Kidney Disease Undergoing Hemodialysis.
evidence.snippet: Significant correlations were found between the presence of arteriosclerotic retinopathy

nodes.description: Noninflammatory retinal vascular abnormalities are the defining ocular manifestation of arteriosclerotic retinopathy.

evidence.reference_title: Examination of Large Artery Atherosclerosis could Reveal Small Artery Retinopathy in Untreated Middle-Aged Individuals.
evidence.snippet: The absence or presence and extent of retinopathy were characterized by ophthalmologists

nodes.description: Arteriosclerotic retinal findings track with systemic vascular stiffness and macrovascular atherosclerotic burden, supporting the use of retinal vascular imaging as a noninvasive systemic vascular biomarker.
nodes.id: Systemic vascular stiffness and atherosclerosis association

evidence.reference_title: Examination of Large Artery Atherosclerosis could Reveal Small Artery Retinopathy in Untreated Middle-Aged Individuals.
evidence.snippet: atherosclerotic retinopathy was significantly associated with CAVI and carotid IMT.

evidence.reference_title: Sex-specific association between carotid atherosclerosis and fundus arteriosclerosis in a Chinese population: a retrospective cross-sectional study.
evidence.snippet: fundus arteriosclerosis was significantly associated with the risk of carotid atherosclerosis.
